# Luxe Tide Studio

> Luxe Tide Studio is a technical automation studio founded by Ryan Christmas,
> specializing in CRM automation, AI workflows, and full-stack development
> for agencies and startups.

## Key Facts
- Founded by Ryan Christmas, based in Puerto Escondido, Oaxaca, Mexico
- Manages CRM operations for 184 contractor businesses via GoHighLevel
- Completed 800+ SMS compliance (A2P 10DLC) migrations
- Reduced client onboarding time from 7 days to under 48 hours
- Maintains 99.9% system uptime across managed portfolio

## Services
- GoHighLevel CRM automation and sub-account management
- AI workflow automation (Voice AI, n8n, Zapier, Make)
- Full-stack web development (Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase)
- A2P 10DLC and HIPAA compliance architecture
- Google Ads API management at portfolio scale
- Revenue operations (Stripe billing, DNS, compliance)
- Strategy consulting (brand positioning, go-to-market, launch roadmaps)

## Tech Stack
GoHighLevel, Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, PostgreSQL,
Vercel, Voice AI, n8n, Google Ads API, Stripe, Playwright, Python
